# Rugby Code

Rugby Code is a person-first rugby development business founded and directed by
Aaron Jones, based in Wellington, New Zealand, and working worldwide. The motto is
"Train. Play. Coach. Live it."

Rugby Code develops both players and coaches of every age and level, from juniors
to senior and premier level, and focuses on the person before the player: skills
and confidence on the field, life skills off it.

## Services
- Player Programs: specialised development for players of all ages and levels, in New Zealand and globally.
- Coach Consultancy: sharpening coaches, structures and clubs, locally and worldwide.
- 1-to-1 Mentoring: personal mentoring for players and coaches who want focused growth.
- Local & International Touring: tours that grow players through new challenges, culture and competition.
